_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: At P0, LacZ+ cells were detected only as a small population of cells located at the infundibulum and bulge of the HF at P2...they expanded in numbers along the outer root sheath and then colonized the matrix, beginning at about P6–P10.
details: Lineage tracing showed dynamic expansion from infundibulum and bulge at P0 to entire upper HF at P2, then colonizing matrix beginning at P6-P10
